name: Fleetwood Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 44% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.7400, stop A$1.3118, target A$2.0027 (0.61:1) — then trail it.
